Familiarity with nature-based carbon projects, including implementation and certification is an additional advantage"

- Minimum 3 years applied research / MEL experience, preferably with a research org (IPA, IDInsight, J-PAL, etc.) or similar rigor environment

jobs.title: Tanzania Gender, Youth and Social Inclusion (GYSI) Lead (Fixed-Term)

metadata.name: Expected Manager (you can leave this blank)
Referral Cheat Sheet
metadata.value:
Here is what to consider when thinking about who to refer:
Commercial orientation and business judgment - Can read margins, costs, pricing, volumes, working capital, and customer / supplier economics. Makes decisions from numbers, not only relationships or narratives. P&L or private-sector exposure is a strong proxy.
Versatility: can strategize, manage, and operate - Can move between strategy, people management, and hands-on execution. Not too senior to operate; not too junior to think structurally. This is probably the most important overall success marker.
Execution ownership in ambiguous, early-stage work - Has built or stabilized something messy without perfect information. Can create structure, make decisions, manage tradeoffs, and push work forward without waiting for perfect clarity.

metadata.name: Expected Manager (you can leave this blank)
Referral Cheat Sheet
metadata.value:
Here is what to consider when thinking about who to refer:
This is a unique opportunity to take ownership of developing a value chain within the Soko team, working alongside other experienced value chain leads. The role is not just about managing day-to-day operations—it is about shaping strategy, solving market challenges, and creating long-term growth.

You would have the chance to:

Lead end-to-end value chain development – from aggregation, to processing, market linkages, partnerships, and commercial growth.
Own a high-visibility portfolio – your work would directly influence how the organization expands into new crops and markets.
Work entrepreneurially – this role is ideal for someone who enjoys building systems, testing ideas, and creating structure where it does not yet exist.
Collaborate with strong peers – you would work alongside other value chain leads, learning from each other while sharing ownership of the broader Soko strategy.
Grow professionally – because the scope is broad, the candidate would develop skills across strategy, operations, partnerships, and commercial execution.

jobs.title: Tupande Market Access Strategy and Operations Associate

metadata.value:

Regulatory Knowledge (NEMA, KENAS and OSHA)
Ability to validate chemical and microbiological analytical methods from scratch for food products.
People and Stakeholder Management
Direct experience with IQ/OQ/PQ (Installation, Operational, and Performance Qualification) for high-end laboratory instrumentation.
Experience developing and enforcing Chemical Hygiene Plans
Budget and project management

metadata.name: Expected Manager (you can leave this blank)
Referral Cheat Sheet
metadata.value:
Here is what to consider when thinking about who to refer:
"FP&A (Financial Planning & Analysis): You aren’t just recording what happened; you’re predicting what will happen. This involves variance analysis—explaining why the actual spend didn't match the budget.

Grant Lifecycle Management: This is the ""Grants Finance"" side. You’ll be tracking money from specific donor to ensure every shilling is spent according to their specific rules.

Compliance & Audit Prep: Ensuring the Uganda program stays ""audit-ready"" by maintaining strict documentation for those specific grants.

Stakeholder Liaison: You’ll be the translator between the ""numbers people"" and the ""program people,"" helping project managers understand their budgets."

metadata.name: Expected Manager (you can leave this blank)
Referral Cheat Sheet
metadata.value:
Here is what to consider when thinking about who to refer:
Commercial & Strategic Acumen: Demonstrated ability to develop commercial strategies and identify significant revenue generation as well as impact opportunities in the agricultural sector for both farmers and the organization

Innovation Pipeline Management: Proven capability in prioritizing, designing, and scaling commercial pilots in a logical and evidence-based sequence.

Financial & Risk Modeling: Strong proficiency in financial modeling and budget management.

Supply Chain & Logistical Execution: Proven capability in overseeing partner negotiations, aggregation logistics, quality control, last mile distribution and ensuring products meet buyer standards or export regulations.

Project & Performance Management: Track record of setting and reviewing KPIs, managing complex multi-workstream programs, and driving accountability for results.

Partnership Management: Demonstrated success in identifying, developing, and managing commercial partnerships with buyers, processors, and distributors.

Stakeholder Influence: Ability to represent the department at senior levels and secure buy-in from cross-functional teams including Field Execution and Government Relations.

People Leadership: Experience coaching senior staff and building a results-oriented, collaborative team culture.

Experience managing small to medium teams and overseeing junior staff, with skills in performance evaluations and capacity building.

Competence in designing study plans, questionnaires, and implementing surveys, including calculating sample sizes and data analysis.
The ability to produce high-quality reports and manage project dashboards.
Experience in budget tracking, expenditure reporting, and asset management.
Represent the department in meetings and contribute to discussions on relevant platforms."
